resources.string: A tiny live wallpaper demo for testing canvas rendering, offsets, and touch input.
This sample wires up a basic WallpaperService, opens the system wallpaper preview, and renders a small animated scene with time, touch ripple, and home-screen offset.
Direct preview is not available on this device. Opening the chooser instead.
Wallpaper chooser is not available on this device.

What to test:
- swipe between launcher pages and watch the orb move
- tap the wallpaper to trigger a ripple
- confirm the time label updates while the wallpaper is visible
